headline: CVS Health Lawsuits Test 340B Practices And Investor Risk Assessment
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) has been hit with two lawsuits from major hospital systems tied to the federal 340B drug discount program. The University of Kansas Hospital Authority and the University of Michigan Hospitals and Health Centers allege CVS Health improperly profited from 340B discounts. Combined claimed damages exceed $60 million, raising legal, financial, and reputational questions for the company. CVS Health comes into this legal pressure with its shares at $93.28 and a return of...
